---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce
1. Command: `diting ...`
2. Error: `...`
3. See error: `...`

## 📋 Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## 📸 Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 📊 Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- **Architecture**: [e.g. arm64, x64]
- **Diting Version**: [e.g. 1.0.1]
- **Installation Method**: [e.g. curl install, npm install, manual]
- **Node.js Version**: [if applicable, e.g. 18.17.0]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔧 Debug Information
```bash
# Please provide the output of:
diting --version
diting config

# And any relevant error logs
```

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I have provided all required information
- [ ] I have included reproduction steps
- [ ] I have included debug information
